name: Reader's Digest Potato Skin Nachos
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Remove the potatoes from the heat and let cool until easy to handle.
3. Halve the potatoes lengthwise and scoop out the pulp, leaving shells about 1/8 inch thick. Half each potato shell lengthwise, then half each piece crosswise.
4. Arrange the potato skins flesh side up on an ungreased baking sheet. Sprinkle with the chili powder and salt.
5. Bake uncovered for 10 minutes or until heated through.
6. Meanwhile, combine the taco sauce, cheese, peppers, garlic, and parsley in a small bowl. Spoon the mixture onto the hot potato skins.
7. With the oven rack set 4 inches from the heat, broil the skins for 1 to 2 minutes or until the cheese melts.
